title: Practical RAG in the Real World: Agents, Retrieval, and Vertex AI
summary: How Retrieval-Augmented Generation with AI agents transforms enterprise knowledge access by grounding AI responses in organizational documents — and why robust governance matters more than impressive demos.

title: Stablecoin Fraud Detection in Cryptocurrency: How Algorithms Can Identify Risk Before It Becomes Loss
summary: A deep dive into how algorithmic approaches can detect fraudulent patterns in stablecoin transactions and surface risk signals before they translate into financial loss.

title: Beyond Hype: Building a Transparent Crypto Trading Bot That You Can Actually Trust
summary: Why opaque black-box trading algorithms fail, and how to build a transparent, rule-based crypto trading bot with proper risk management, backtesting, and logging you can actually reason about.
